channel.title: The Great Discovery
channel.copyright: © César Manuel Malainho de Oliveira — CC BY-NC-ND 4.0
channel.description: The work "The Great Discovery / The Great Choice" read aloud, in full. A dialogue between two friends — Tom and Roger — with completely different views on life. Freely distributed. Full text at https://malainho.github.io/thegreatdiscovery/
channel.itunes:author: César Manuel Malainho de Oliveira
channel.itunes:summary: The work "The Great Discovery / The Great Choice" read aloud, in full. A dialogue between two friends — Tom and Roger — with completely different views on life. Freely distributed. Full text at https://malainho.github.io/thegreatdiscovery/

item.title: The Great Discovery — Full reading
item.description: The complete work read aloud, in English. The work "The Great Discovery / The Great Choice" read aloud, in full. A dialogue between two friends — Tom and Roger — with completely different views on life. Freely distributed. Full text at https://malainho.github.io/thegreatdiscovery/
